chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ لَا يَجِبُ لَهُ الْإِفْطَارُ وَ التَّقْصِيرُ فِي السَّفَرِ وَ مَنْ يَجِبُ لَهُ ذَلِكَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 50 – The one for whom the breaking (of the Fast) and the shortening (of the Prayer is not Obligated, and the one for whom that is Obligated

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/329)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/329)
text: لَا يُفْطِرُ الرَّجُلُ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ إِلَّا فِي سَبِيلِ حَقٍّ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of his companions who said,
‘The man would not break (the Fast) during a Month of Ramazan except in a way of Truth’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘One must not stop fasting in the month of Ramadan except in the way of truth.’”
